hero.thesis: Build custom AI workflows using n8n and Make for SMBs, focusing on service businesses that need automation. Charge $2k setup plus $300/month for maintenance.
hero.marketSize: Service businesses spend over $10 billion annually on workflow automation, with a growing demand for AI-integrated solutions.
hero.payingEvidence: Case studies show businesses like 'Flowify Solutions' and 'AutomatePro' charging similar fees with a steady client base.

ninetyDay.title: Market Research & Network Building

actions.action: Identify 20 local service businesses in your area via LinkedIn and Yelp.
Join 3 relevant online communities (e.g., Reddit's r/smallbusiness, 'Automate SMBs' Discord, 'Workflow Innovators' LinkedIn group).
Post an introduction and value offer in each community, highlighting your AI workflow expertise.

ninetyDay.metric: Engage with at least 5 potential leads.

ninetyDay.title: Tool Stack Setup & Demo Creation

actions.action: Set up accounts on n8n and Make. Create a basic workflow demo using free tier features.
Use Loom to record a 5-minute demo video showcasing the workflow benefits.

ninetyDay.metric: Have a demo video and a functional workflow to showcase.

ninetyDay.title: Outreach to Potential Clients

actions.action: Use Apollo to gather contact information for your 20 identified businesses.
Send personalized emails to 10 businesses using the outreach script.

ninetyDay.metric: Send outreach to at least 10 businesses.

ninetyDay.title: Follow-Up & Lead Nurturing

actions.action: Follow up on initial emails with a case study or testimonial from a real or hypothetical client.
Schedule 2 calls or meetings with interested leads using Calendly.

ninetyDay.metric: Secure at least 2 meetings with potential clients.

actions.action: Conduct meetings, present demo, and close the first client.
Gather feedback from the client to refine your offering.

ninetyDay.title: Scale Outreach & Content Marketing

actions.action: Double the outreach by emailing 10 more businesses.
Write and publish a blog post on Medium or LinkedIn about AI workflow benefits for SMBs.

ninetyDay.metric: Expand reach by 10 more businesses and publish content.

actions.action: Create a monthly maintenance schedule for your client.
Develop a secondary workflow to upsell to the existing client.

ninetyDay.title: Community Engagement & Expert Positioning

actions.action: Host an AMA session on 'Workflow Innovators' LinkedIn group to share insights.
Identify speaking opportunities or podcasts to guest on.

ninetyDay.metric: Engage in 1 AMA and identify 3 speaking opportunities.

actions.action: Research additional tools like Zapier that complement n8n and Make.
actions.success: List of 2 additional tools to integrate.

actions.action: Design a new service package incorporating these tools.
Document standard operating procedures (SOPs) for client onboarding and maintenance.
Automate invoicing using tools like Stripe or Lovable.
Collect feedback from all clients via survey or direct call.
Implement changes based on feedback to improve service quality.
Review financials and client satisfaction metrics to assess growth.
Develop a plan for client retention and acquisition for the next quarter.

toolStack.name: n8n
toolStack.why: For creating custom workflows with open-source flexibility.
toolStack.pricing: Free with paid plans starting at $20/month.

toolStack.name: Make
toolStack.why: For visual workflow automation with AI integration capabilities.
toolStack.pricing: Free with paid plans starting at $9/month.

toolStack.name: Apollo
toolStack.why: For gathering contact information and managing outreach campaigns.
toolStack.pricing: Free with paid plans starting at $39/month.

toolStack.name: Calendly
toolStack.why: To schedule meetings with potential clients seamlessly.
toolStack.pricing: Free with paid plans starting at $8/month.

toolStack.name: Stripe
toolStack.why: To handle payment processing for client billing.
toolStack.pricing: Free to start, with transaction fees.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Hi [Name],

I'm [Your Name], and I specialize in creating custom AI workflows for service businesses like [Niche]. I noticed your business, and I believe there's a great opportunity to streamline your operations and save time through automation. 

I'd love to share a quick 5-minute demo with you. Let me know if you're interested!

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Day 1: Initial Email; Day 3: Follow-Up Email; Day 7: Value Add Email

pricing.raisingRules: Raise prices every 6 months by 10% based on demand and capacity.

failureModes: Failing to deliver promised automation value.
Ignoring client feedback and failing to iterate.
Underestimating time commitment needed for client onboarding.
Ineffective outreach leading to no clients.
Burnout from handling too many clients solo.
Failure to document processes leading to inefficiencies.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to incorporate your business in Delaware.
setup.payments: Set up Stripe for handling all client transactions.
setup.contracts: Draft a standard client contract using a template from LawDepot.
setup.insurance: Get professional liability insurance through Hiscox.

scaling: To scale from solo operator to a small team, first hire a virtual assistant (VA) to handle administrative tasks such as scheduling, invoicing, and client follow-ups. Use platforms like Upwork to find a reliable VA. As demand grows, bring on a junior developer familiar with n8n and Make to assist with workflow builds and maintenance. This will allow you to focus on client acquisition and strategic growth. Create a knowledge base using Notion for onboarding new team members efficiently. Continue to invest in process automation to minimize manual tasks and maximize efficiency.
